hero.title: Escape The Backrooms Wiki
hero.description: Escape The Backrooms is a 1-4 player co-op horror game where players explore 30+ eerie Backrooms levels, solve exit puzzles, manage sanity, and avoid deadly entities.

gameFeature.title: Escape The Backrooms Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Explore liminal levels, solve puzzles, avoid entities, and survive with your co-op team in Escape The Backrooms.

escapeTheBackroomsBeginnerGuide.title: Escape The Backrooms Beginner Guide
escapeTheBackroomsBeginnerGuide.intro: Learn the co-op survival loop before tackling long runs and harder levels.

steps.title: Stay grouped early
steps.description: Keep line-of-sight with teammates to reduce early wipes and confusion.

steps.title: Read each level objective
steps.description: Every area has specific escape logic; identify it before sprinting.

steps.title: Preserve stamina and items
steps.description: Waste fewer resources so late-level pressure is easier to handle.

steps.title: Use short callouts
steps.description: Fast location callouts are better than long explanations mid-chase.

quickTips: Move with intent and avoid dead-end exploration.
Keep one player focused on objective tracking.
Reset comms after each encounter to avoid panic chain mistakes.

escapeTheBackroomsAllLevelsWalkthrough.title: Escape The Backrooms All Levels Walkthrough
escapeTheBackroomsAllLevelsWalkthrough.intro: A practical route overview for major level progression and pace control.

items.name: Level 0 Start
items.description: Prioritize path discipline and landmark memory.

items.name: Hub and Midgame Chain
items.description: Use hub transitions to regroup and reassign roles.

items.name: Entity-heavy Corridors
items.description: Slow entries and door checks reduce surprise eliminations.

items.name: Late-game Branches
items.description: Commit to one route plan to avoid high-risk backtracking.

escapeTheBackroomsEntitiesGuide.title: Escape The Backrooms Entities Guide
escapeTheBackroomsEntitiesGuide.intro: Understand core entity patterns so each encounter has a clear response.

cards.name: Bacteria
cards.description: Pressure threat that punishes hesitation in open routes.

cards.name: Skin Stealer
cards.description: Stay with verified teammates and avoid isolated movement.

cards.name: Smiler
cards.description: Manage darkness and visibility to prevent avoidable deaths.

cards.name: Level-specific threats
cards.description: Treat each level entity as unique and adapt quickly.

escapeTheBackroomsMultiplayerCrossplayVo.title: Escape The Backrooms Multiplayer Crossplay and Voice Chat
escapeTheBackroomsMultiplayerCrossplayVo.intro: Play solo or co-op across platforms with lobby codes, crossplay toggles, and proximity voice chat tuned for cleaner callouts.

cards.name: Crossplay lobbies
cards.description: Host public or private sessions and share lobby codes so friends on PC, Xbox, and PS5 can join quickly.

cards.name: Role assignment
cards.description: Split duties into pathfinder, puzzle lead, and safety caller to keep decisions fast in high-pressure levels.

cards.name: Voice discipline
cards.description: Use short proximity chat callouts, and lower chatter during entity patrol windows to reduce avoidable wipes.

cards.name: Recovery plan
cards.description: Set regroup checkpoints and fallback routes before difficult sections so failed attempts recover faster.

escapeTheBackroomsAchievementsTrophies.title: Escape The Backrooms Achievements and Trophies
escapeTheBackroomsAchievementsTrophies.intro: The Steam set has 34 achievements, mostly level exits plus difficulty and multiplayer goals that reward structured progression.

groups.name: Progress milestones
items: Clear level-exit achievements first to lock in most of your total completion.
Track missed level triggers after each run so cleanup sessions stay short.

groups.name: Challenge milestones
items: Leave Hard and Nightmare targets for teams with stable route memory and role discipline.
Run multiplayer challenge achievements only after your group can clear core levels consistently.

escapeTheBackroomsSystemRequirementsSett.title: Escape The Backrooms System Requirements and Settings
escapeTheBackroomsSystemRequirementsSett.intro: Use official PC requirements and platform notes to pick stable settings, language support, and co-op-ready performance baselines.

rows.name: PC baseline
rows.description: Minimum target: Windows 10/11 64-bit, 8 GB RAM, DirectX 11 support, and 25 GB free storage.

rows.name: Graphics balance
rows.description: Recommended target: Windows 11, 16 GB RAM, and RTX 2060 or RX 6600 class GPU for steadier co-op performance.

rows.name: Audio and voice
rows.description: Keep voice levels below ambient cues, and verify language availability before cross-region sessions.

rows.name: Platform checks
rows.description: Confirm version parity on Steam, Xbox, and PS5 before crossplay so lobby joins and objectives stay synchronized.

entries.title: 2025 Full Release and Stabilization
entries.description: The game exited Early Access in October 2025, followed by hotfixes focused on crash and progression stability.

entries.title: 2026 Cross-Platform Matchmaking Expansion
entries.description: Roadmap updates introduced cross-platform matchmaking, lobby code flow, and broader voice-chat support.

entries.title: Latest Patch and Console Launch Window
entries.description: Recent patch cycles added platform safety tools, autosave messaging, and launch alignment across Steam, Xbox, and PS5.

faq.title: Escape The Backrooms FAQ
faq.subtitle: Key answers for Escape The Backrooms players

questions.question: Is Escape The Backrooms playable solo?
questions.answer: Yes, Escape The Backrooms supports solo play, though co-op improves consistency on difficult routes.

questions.question: Does Escape The Backrooms support crossplay?
questions.answer: Yes, Escape The Backrooms supports cross-platform matchmaking with lobby codes on supported platforms.

questions.question: How many players can join Escape The Backrooms co-op?
questions.answer: Escape The Backrooms supports up to four players in online co-op sessions.

questions.question: What is the best way to start Escape The Backrooms?
questions.answer: Start Escape The Backrooms with the beginner route, objective-first pacing, and short team callouts.
